description_long: This is a modern front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a predominantly white exterior. The front features a large circular door with a dark gray rim, allowing access to the drum inside, and a control panel above it with a rotary dial, several buttons, and indicator lights. The sides and back are plain, with subtle vertical grooves on the sides for structural reinforcement and a smooth, unadorned rear panel. The top surface is flat and can serve as a temporary support for lightweight objects. The washing machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal and plastic, with a glass or transparent plastic window in the door. The overall design is functional and typical for household appliances found in urban environments.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a large circular door and a control panel featuring a dial and buttons above the door. The sides are plain with subtle grooves, and the overall design is modern and utilitarian.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular door with a dark rim, the control panel with a dial and buttons, and a visible brand logo.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain white panel with vertical grooves and no visible controls or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view is a smooth, featureless white panel with no visible controls, doors, or branding.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with vertical grooves and a plain white finish.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a central rotary dial, a row of small round buttons to the right, and indicator lights above the buttons. There is also a brand logo on the left side of the panel.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular porthole door with a dark gray rim, likely plastic or rubber, and a visible handle integrated into the rim.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the left side of the control panel, with the text 'Whirlpool' in a stylized font.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is not clearly visible, but it is likely integrated into the left side of the control panel above the door.
attribute_drum_visibility: Partially visible through the transparent section of the front door.
